title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 40.285 - Disrespect to superior commissioned officer — court-martial
text:
40.285.  Disrespect to superior commissioned officer — court-martial. — Any person subject to sections 40.005 to 40.490 who behaves with disrespect toward his superior commissioned officer shall be punished as a court-martial may direct.
(L. 1984 H.B. 1035 § 90)
